title: Thermal cameras and artificial intelligence to prevent whale collisions in the Balearics

title: Revolutionizing Teen Education: Launch of Applied AI Certificate Program
description: HOAG, in collaboration with BITS BioCyTiH Foundation, has launched an online Certificate Program in Applied Artificial Intelligence for students aged 12 to 17. This immersive three-month program aims to evolve teenagers from AI consumers to creators through a structured curriculum emphasizing practical AI solutions, design thinking, and innovation.

description: Anthropic has warned that artificial general intelligence (AGI) could become a reality by 2028, while urging the United States to maintain its technological edge over China in the rapidly intensifying AI race.

title: HOAG and BITS BioCyTiH Foundation Launch Applied AI Program for Students Aged 12 to 17
description: New Delhi [India], May 16: HOAG, in collaboration with BITS BioCyTiH Foundation (BBF), the deep-tech and innovation initiative of BITS Pilani, has announced the launch of the Certificate Program in Applied Artificial Intelligence, a fully online, three-month immersive program designed for students aged 12 to 17. This online program falls under HOAG's Future Essentials category which focuses on future-forward critical competencies for young learners.

title: AI becoming infrastructure of intelligence: TCS chairman N Chandrasekaran
description: Artificial intelligence is now the core operating system for businesses worldwide. TCS Chairman N Chandrasekaran stated AI services are generating billions in revenue. The company is building secure AI infrastructure and an AI operating system for industries. India is becoming a key destination for AI infrastructure. TCS also reported strong profit growth and job additions.

title: Why blockchain and AI are becoming essential for secure digital payments
description: As digital payments become central to everyday transactions and large-value transfers, the need for stronger security infrastructure is growing rapidly. Experts say blockchain and artificial intelligence are emerging as key technologies for building faster, safer and more trustworthy payment ecosystems.
